title: Gooey Crumbled Cheese Ukranian
description: An earthy and gooey post-workout Ukrainian dish featuring cheese slices fermented with a touch of sweetness for diabetic-friendly options.
instructions: Blend cheddar cheese, almond milk, vanilla extract, baking powder, flax seeds, and salt in a blender until smooth.
Slowly add fresh lemon juice while blending to create a creamy texture without it becoming too watery.
Pour the mixture into a small saucepan over low heat and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent scorching.
Transfer the cooked mixture to a clean container or mold. Allow it to cool and set at room temperature before slicing.
